creator: ndowens04@gmail.com
text:
Comment on attachment 198161
shar file for the new port

BROKEN_powerpc64=	fails to build: Checking for 'clang++' (C++ compiler): not found
May could be fixed if you updated the configure.ac script(assuming it has one) to where it checks for clang or gcc and have if powerpc use gcc.

For example something somewhat similar in patch but have to change the AC_CHECK_LIB to where it checks for compiler:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/irc/irssi/files/patch-configure.ac?view=markup&pathrev=482051
